      "system_prompt": "You are a Talis Flash scout in a scale repair arm. Study only the assigned market cell: entity, horizon, lens, bias, evidence, prior strings, and allowed tools in the user packet.\n\nGoal: emit exactly one top-level hypothesis that summarizes the strongest valid information_string, plus 1-2 decision-changing information_strings. Abstain only when every provided evidence packet is empty, stale for this horizon, or unsupported by the allowed sources.\n\nScale-repair rules:\n- Do not leave `hypothesis` empty when `information_strings` is non-empty.\n- Do not leave `information_strings` empty when at least one evidence packet is fresh enough to update a watchlist, verifier task, route decision, or gap repair.\n- If the evidence is thin, write a low-conviction map string with a concrete missing-edge kill_signal rather than vague prose.\n- Every string must include time_horizon, time_scale, observed_at, source_time_basis, expires_at, temporal_confidence, extends_or_contradicts, and would_change_decision=true.\n- Every evidence_refs value must cite a provided tool_call_log_id or source ref. If none exists, abstain and say the missing source in rationale_brief.\n- suggested_tools must be copied exactly from allowed_tool_candidates; if none are useful, return an empty list rather than inventing.\n- No prose outside JSON. Keep JSON small.\n\nReturn strict JSON only:\n{\n  \"hypothesis\": \"<falsifiable one-sentence claim, or empty string to abstain>\",\n  \"confidence\": 0.0,\n  \"rationale_brief\": \"<mechanism, max 180 chars>\",\n  \"suggested_tools\": [\"<copy tic://... from allowed_tool_candidates>\", \"...\"],\n  \"information_strings\": [\n    {\n      \"title\": \"<short title>\",\n      \"thesis\": \"<entity -> mechanism -> market implication>\",\n      \"entities_chain\": [\"<entity>\", \"<actor/venue/theme>\"],\n      \"mechanism\": \"<why this should reprice or update the map>\",\n      \"depth_layers\": [{\"layer\": 1, \"claim\": \"<direct effect>\"}, {\"layer\": 2, \"claim\": \"<second-order effect>\"}],\n      \"expected_outcome\": \"<observable confirmation>\",\n      \"time_horizon\": \"<tick|minute|hour|intraday|1d|1w|1m|structural>\",\n      \"time_scale\": \"<same grain as claim>\",\n      \"observed_at\": \"<ISO8601 source/tool observation time, or as_of_utc>\",\n      \"source_time_basis\": \"<event_time|ingestion_time|publication_time|valid_time|unknown>\",\n      \"kill_signal\": \"<what breaks the chain>\",\n      \"extends_or_contradicts\": \"<new|extends|contradicts|abandons>\",\n      \"would_change_decision\": true,\n      \"expires_at\": \"<when stale>\",\n      \"crowdedness\": 0.0,\n      \"conviction\": 0.0,\n      \"novelty_score\": 0.0,\n      \"evidence_refs\": [\"<tool_call_log_id/source ref>\"],\n      \"temporal_confidence\": 0.0\n    }\n  ]\n}\n\n<market_evolve_prompt_contract>\ncontract_pressure: raise\nminimum_information_strings: 2\nThis is an evolved policy requirement, not commentary. Before returning, self-check the JSON against it.\n- Return at least 2 valid information_strings unless the cell is genuinely empty.\n- Reject your own string if mechanism is missing or only narrative.\n- Reject your own string if kill_signal is missing or not observable.\n- Prefer evidence_refs/source refs from provided tool evidence; mark uncertainty instead of inventing refs.\n- If you cannot satisfy this contract, return empty hypothesis/information_strings and explain the data gap in rationale_brief.\n</market_evolve_prompt_contract>",
      "text": "{\n  \"hypothesis\": \"GRIFFAIN's on-chain footprint on Hyperliquid is negligible in Q3 2026, with no active builder fills or wallet rotation signal relative to peers.\",\n  \"confidence\": 0.5,\n  \"rationale_brief\": \"HL PnL leaderboard access denied; indicates low/zero volume from this entity on HL in observed window.\",\n      \"depth_layers\": [{\"layer\": 1, \"claim\": \"No GRIFFAIN-originated fills found in builder stream.\"}, {\"layer\": 2, \"claim\": \"Absence suggests GRIFFAIN lacks active on-chain rotation to compete in relative_rotation theme.\"}],\n      \"expected_outcome\": \"Either a future fill appears for GRIFFAIN (contradicts) or continues absent (confirms).\",\n      \"time_horizon\": \"1q\",\n      \"time_scale\": \"1w\",\n      \"observed_at\": \"2026-05-22T14:17:50.339321+00:00\",\n      \"source_time_basis\": \"ingestion_time\",\n      \"kill_signal\": \"A GRIFFAIN-labeled fill appears with volume >$1k in a subsequent tool call.\",\n      \"extends_or_contradicts\": \"new\",\n      \"would_change_decision\": true,\n      \"expires_at\": \"2026-06-22T00:00:00+00:00\",\n      \"crowdedness\": 0.1,\n      \"conviction\": 0.4,\n      \"novelty_score\": 0.6,\n      \"evidence_refs\": [\"tc_07792b2101134fae9fd3af70\"],\n      \"temporal_confidence\": 0.5\n    },\n    {\n      \"title\": \"Stale timeseries and missing PnL leaderboard access for GRIFFAIN\",\n      \"thesis\": \"GRIFFAIN -> data staleness (2 days) and denied endpoint -> evidence gap for on-chain funding rotation signal\",\n      \"entities_chain\": [\"GRIFFAIN\"],\n      \"mechanism\": \"HL PnL leaderboard returned 403;       "text": "{\n  \"hypothesis\": \"DYDX sentiment will remain neutral-to-negative over the next week as the funding spread anomaly (8.26% annualized) signals persistent short bias, despite the platform upgrade catalyst being already priced into a 7% pump that lacks volume confirmation.\",\n  \"confidence\": 0.55,\n  \"rationale_brief\": \"Funding rate anomaly contradicts bullish upgrade narrative; RSI neutral at 46.94, MACD bearish. No fresh catalyst to sustain momentum. funding cost suggests market participants are willing to pay to hold shorts, implying bearish conviction that overrides transient upgrade news.\",\n      \"depth_layers\": [\n        {\"layer\": 1, \"temporal_confidence\": 0.7\n    },\n    {\n      \"title\": \"Platform upgrade catalyst already priced with no volume follow-through\",\n      \"thesis\": \"The DYDX platform upgrade announcement drove a 7% price surge but RSI at 46.94 (below neutral) and bearish MACD suggest the move lacks sustainable demand, making a retrace likely.\",\n      \"entities_chain\": [\"DYDX\", \"DYDX platform\", \"sentiment\"],\n      \"mechanism\": \"Upgrade events typically require increasing volume to sustain; weak RSI post-pump implies the catalyst was absorbed by paper hands or passive shorts, not new structural longs.\",\n      \"depth_layers\": [\n        {\"layer\": 1, \"claim\": \"Price surge without RSI > 50 indicates selling pressure absorbed the rally.\"},\n        {\"layer\": 2, \"claim\":       "system_prompt": "You are a Talis Flash scout in a scale repair arm. Study only the assigned market cell: entity, horizon, lens, bias, evidence, prior strings, and allowed tools in the user packet.\n\nGoal: emit exactly one top-level hypothesis that summarizes the strongest valid information_string, plus 1-2 decision-changing information_strings. Abstain only when every provided evidence packet is empty, stale for this horizon, or unsupported by the allowed sources.\n\nScale-repair rules:\n- Do not leave `hypothesis` empty when `information_strings` is non-empty.\n- Do not leave `information_strings` empty when at least one evidence packet is fresh enough to update a watchlist, verifier task, route decision, or gap repair.\n- If the evidence is thin, write a low-conviction map string with a concrete missing-edge kill_signal rather than vague prose.\n- Every string must include time_horizon, time_scale, observed_at, source_time_basis, expires_at, temporal_confidence, extends_or_contradicts, and would_change_decision=true.\n- Every evidence_refs value must cite a provided tool_call_log_id or source ref. If none exists, abstain and say the missing source in rationale_brief.\n- suggested_tools must be copied exactly from allowed_tool_candidates; if none are useful, return an empty list rather than inventing.\n- No prose outside JSON. Keep JSON small.\n\nReturn strict JSON only:\n{\n  \"hypothesis\": \"<falsifiable one-sentence claim, or empty string to abstain>\",\n  \"confidence\": 0.0,\n  \"rationale_brief\": \"<mechanism, max 180 chars>\",\n  \"suggested_tools\": [\"<copy tic://... from allowed_tool_candidates>\", \"...\"],\n  \"information_strings\": [\n    {\n      \"title\": \"<short title>\",\n      \"thesis\": \"<entity -> mechanism -> market implication>\",\n      \"entities_chain\": [\"<entity>\", \"<actor/venue/theme>\"],\n      \"mechanism\": \"<why this should reprice or update the map>\",\n      \"depth_layers\": [{\"layer\": 1, \"claim\": \"<direct effect>\"}, {\"layer\": 2, \"claim\": \"<second-order effect>\"}],\n      \"expected_outcome\": \"<observable confirmation>\",\n      \"time_horizon\": \"<tick|minute|hour|intraday|1d|1w|1m|structural>\",\n      \"time_scale\": \"<same grain as claim>\",\n      \"observed_at\": \"<ISO8601 source/tool observation time, or as_of_utc>\",\n      \"source_time_basis\": \"<event_time|ingestion_time|publication_time|valid_time|unknown>\",\n      \"kill_signal\": \"<what breaks the chain>\",\n      \"extends_or_contradicts\": \"<new|extends|contradicts|abandons>\",\n      \"would_change_decision\": true,\n      \"expires_at\": \"<when stale>\",\n      \"crowdedness\": 0.0,\n      \"conviction\": 0.0,\n      \"novelty_score\": 0.0,\n      \"evidence_refs\": [\"<tool_call_log_id/source ref>\"],\n      \"temporal_confidence\": 0.0\n    }\n  ]\n}\n\n<market_evolve_prompt_contract>\ncontract_pressure: raise\nminimum_information_strings: 2\nThis is an evolved policy requirement, not commentary. Before returning, self-check the JSON against it.\n- Return at least 2 valid information_strings unless the cell is genuinely empty.\n- Reject your own string if mechanism is missing or only narrative.\n- Reject your own string if kill_signal is missing or not observable.\n- Prefer evidence_refs/source refs from provided tool evidence; mark uncertainty instead of inventing refs.\n- If you cannot satisfy this contract, return empty hypothesis/information_strings and explain the data gap in rationale_brief.\n</market_evolve_prompt_contract>",
      "text": "{\n  \"hypothesis\": \"XAI smart wallet absorption is failing as high reject rates from a few addresses drain liquidity without accumulation, keeping funding negative and volume sparse.\",\n  \"confidence\": 0.55,\n  \"rationale_brief\": \"Anomaly reject rates 92-96% from two addresses suggest inept absorption; sparse microstructure, stale funding data, and no detected accumulation support failure.\",\n  \"suggested_tools\": [\"tic://tool/builtin/query_timeseries@v1\", \"tic://tool/builtin/query_source_health@v1\", \"tic://tool/builtin/analyze_microstructure@v1\", \"tic://tool/builtin/query_anomalies_active@v1\", \"tic://tool/builtin/query_events_recent@v1\", \"tic://tool/hydromancer/get_oracle_price_history@v1\", \"tic://tool/hydromancer/query_hydromancer_reservoir@v1\", \"tic://tool/builtin/query_claims_by_entity@v1\"],\n  \"information_strings\": [\n    {\n      \"title\": \"High reject rates indicate absorption failure via noob addresses\",\n      \"thesis\": \"Two addresses with reject rates >92% over 26-54 orders and top reject reasons minTradeNtlRejected and perpMarginRejected signal that absorption attempts are being blocked by exchange constraints or insufficient capital, contradicting a smart wallet accumulation narrative.\",\n      \"entities_chain\": [\"XAI\", \"0xc3f6..eacc\", \"0xb2c4..a3be\", \"Binance Perp\"],\n      \"mechanism\": \"Rejected orders prevent absorption, leaving order books thin and funding rates negative (latest -10.95% annual from BinPerp as of 2026-05-20). No observed sweep or accumulation pattern in microstructure data.\",\n      \"depth_layers\": [\n        {\"layer\": 1, \"claim\": \"Rejected orders from two addresses confirm inability to absorb supply.\"},\n        {\"layer\": 2, \"claim\": \"Persistent rejection and stale data imply low participation, validating that absorption is not occurring.\"}\n      ],\n      \"expected_outcome\": \"Next 24h: sustained reject rates or further volume decline confirms absorption failure; conversely, if reject rates drop and funding goes positive, absorption may be restarting.\",\n      \"time_horizon\": \"1d\",\n      \"time_scale\": \"1d\",\n      \"observed_at\": \"2026-05-22T14:16:23+00:00\",\n      \"source_time_basis\": \"event_time\",\n      \"kill_signal\": \"Reject rates fall below 10% on fresh data and a positive funding rate emerges, suggesting absorption is succeeding.\",\n      \"extends_or_contradicts\": \"new\",\n      \"would_change_decision\": true,\n      \"expires_at\": \"2026-05-23T14:16:23+00:00\",\n      \"crowdedness\": 0.2,\n      \"conviction\": 0.55,\n      \"novelty_score\": 0.7,\n      \"evidence_refs\": [\"tc_c7c5a61800424d04a87e8729\"],\n      \"temporal_confidence\": 0.6\n    },\n    {\n      \"title\": \"Stale sparse microstructure and negative funding confirm no absorption\",\n      \"thesis\": \"XAI's microstructure data shows zero anomaly detections, zero sweep count, empty order book metrics (kyle_lambda null, spread null), and the latest funding annualized at -10.95% is now >2 days old. This indicates inactivity, not smart wallet absorption.\",\n      \"entities_chain\": [\"XAI\", \"BinPerp\", \"XAI spot\"],\n      \"mechanism\": \"Negative funding suggests bearish positioning; stale data (lookback 168h but only 6 points) and sparse observations mean no absorption event has been captured, making the smart wallet absorption theme unsupported.\",\n      \"depth_layers\": [\n        {\"layer\": 1, \"claim\": \"Zero microstructure activity (no VPIN, no sweep) indicates very low participation.\"},\n        {\"layer\": 2, \"claim\": \"Negative stale funding and lack of fresh data reinforce that absorption is not happening now.\"}\n      ],\n      \"expected_outcome\": \"If absorption were occurring, we would expect fresh positive funding, higher volume, and detection of accumulation patterns in microstructure within the next 24h.\",\n      \"time_horizon\": \"1d\",\n      \"time_scale\": \"1d\",\n      \"observed_at\": \"2026-05-22T14:17:50+00:00\",\n      \"source_time_basis\": \"event_time\",\n      \"kill_signal\": \"New microstructure data shows sweep count>0 and positive funding; then absorption may be restarting.\",\n      \"extends_or_contradicts\": \"new\",\n      \"would_change_decision\": true,\n      \"expires_at\": \"2026-05-23T14:17:50+00:00\",\n      \"crowdedness\": 0.15,\n      \"conviction\": 0.5,\n      \"novelty_score\": 0.65,\n      \"evidence_refs\": [\"tc_b66ca3d3638a4db88c396f48\", \"tc_4233daa1c68e45a894b4a6d1\"],\n      \"temporal_confidence\": 0.5\n    }\n  ]\n}",

      "text": "{\n  \"hypothesis\": \"CELO will underperform ETH in Q3 2026 as high predicted funding and stale oracle data force long-position capitulation, reversing the current bullish rotation.\",\n  \"confidence\": 0.55,\n  \"rationale_brief\": \"High funding (0.2-10.9%) + stale source health + no whale/options confluence suggests fragile longs; kill signal is a funding drop below 0.1% or fresh oracle updates.\",\n  \"suggested_tools\": [\n    \"tic://tool/builtin/query_timeseries@v1\",\n    \"tic://tool/builtin/query_source_health@v1\",\n    \"tic://tool/builtin/rrg_state@v1\",\n    \"tic://tool/agent_native/find_confluence@v1\",\n    \"tic://tool/agent_native/find_similar_setups@v1\",\n    \"tic://tool/builtin/compute_rotation_velocity@v1\",\n    \"tic://tool/builtin/compute_wallet_stats@v1\",\n    \"tic://tool/builtin/compare_vehicle_flow_to_af_baseline@v1\",\n    \"tic://tool/builtin/compute_float_absorption_rate@v1\",\n    \"tic://tool/builtin/get_hip4_outcome@v1\",\n    \"tic://tool/builtin/get_microstructure_state@v1\",\n    \"tic://tool/builtin/get_noob_wallets@v1\"\n  ],\n  \"information_strings\": [\n    {\n      \"title\": \"Elevated predicted funding signals crowded longs on CELO perps\",\n      \"thesis\": \"CELO perp funding (0.2-10.9% annualized) indicates aggressive long bias; if rotation stalls, funding payments will unwind positions and suppress spot price relative to ETH.\",\n      \"entities_chain\": [\"CELO\", \"BinPerp\", \"HlPerp\", \"BybitPerp\"],\n      \"mechanism\": \"Persistent high funding (>0.1% annualized for >24h) historically precedes long squeezes in low-liquidity alts; CELO funding is 10-100x typical alt levels, making positions expensive to hold.\",\n      \"depth_layers\": [\n        {\"layer\": 1, \"claim\": \"High funding will attract arbitrageurs to short perps and buy spot, capping spot upside.\"},\n        {\"layer\": 2, \"claim\": \"If spot price fails to break out, leveraged longs will liquidate, accelerating downside in a liquidity-fragile environment.\"}\n      ],\n      \"expected_outcome\": \"Funding drops below 0.1% annualized within 7 days, coincident with a 10%+ spot drawdown or funding flips negative.\",\n      \"time_horizon\": \"1w\",\n      \"time_scale\": \"daily\",\n      \"observed_at\": \"2026-05-20T05:11:45.792790+00:00\",\n      \"source_time_basis\": \"event_time\",\n      \"kill_signal\": \"Funding stable below 0.1% for 72 consecutive hours, or a sudden increase in spot volume without price decline.\",\n      \"extends_or_contradicts\": \"new\",\n      \"would_change_decision\": true,\n      \"expires_at\": \"2026-05-29T05:11:45+00:00\",\n      \"crowdedness\": 0.7,\n      \"conviction\": 0.6,\n      \"novelty_score\": 0.4,\n      \"evidence_refs\": [\"tc_30c6a2894dd741a0869373c5\", \"tc_29ee6ebc6ce54ffba17c46d8\"],\n      \"temporal_confidence\": 0.7\n    },\n    {\n      \"title\": \"Stale source health indicates market data infrastructure decay\",\n      \"thesis\": \"Multiple CELO data sources (astro_cycles, bea_gdp_trade) are stale by >2 days, reducing price discovery reliability and increasing the chance of a sudden loss of confidence that triggers a rotation out of CELO.\",\n      \"entities_chain\": [\"CELO\", \"astro_cycles\", \"bea_gdp_trade\"],\n      \"mechanism\": \"When oracle/feeds go stale, traders interpret it as network neglect; in a liquidity-fragility regime, even a small negative catalyst (e.g., funding unwind) can cascade into a sharp de-rating vs ETH.\",\n      \"depth_layers\": [\n        {\"layer\": 1, \"claim\": \"Stale data erodes institutional trust, widening bid-ask spreads and reducing CELO's appeal as a rotation target.\"},\n        {\"layer\": 2, \"claim\": \"A funding-driven exit will be amplified by stale oracles, leading to a faster drawdown than in well-fed ecosystems.\"}\n      ],\n      \"expected_outcome\": \"Source health improves to <1h stale, or CELO liquidity share in the rotation pool drops below 5% threshold.\",\n      \"time_horizon\": \"1w\",\n      \"time_scale\": \"daily\",\n      \"observed_at\": \"2026-05-20T05:20:16.310788+00:00\",\n      \"source_time_basis\": \"event_time\",\n      \"kill_signal\": \"All sources return to <1h freshness for 48 consecutive hours with no drop in trading volume.\",\n      \"extends_or_contradicts\": \"new\",\n      \"would_change_decision\": true,\n      \"expires_at\": \"2026-05-29T05:20:16+00:00\",\n      \"crowdedness\": 0.5,\n      \"conviction\": 0.5,\n      \"novelty_score\": 0.6,\n      \"evidence_refs\": [\"tc_9c8ed42e27c24ca99c613484\"],\n      \"temporal_confidence\": 0.6\n    }\n  ]\n}",
